definition: Disturbance level at which essential function falls below acceptable performance
measurement_note: Requires defining essential function and minimum acceptable performance

definition: Time required to restore essential function after disturbance
measurement_note: Should be measured alongside recovery quality and post-recovery condition

definition: Degree to which function returns to prior or acceptable level
measurement_note: May hide hidden depletion if measured alone

definition: Ability to learn revise mobilize resources and change behavior under uncertainty
measurement_note: Requires governance learning trust and resource indicators

definition: Reserve capacity slack storage redundancy or backup options available under stress
measurement_note: Must account for maintenance quality and actual accessibility

definition: Differentiated responses among components that support similar functions
measurement_note: Reduces synchronized failure when responses differ meaningfully

definition: Estimated closeness to known or suspected tipping point regime shift or capacity boundary
measurement_note: Requires uncertainty labeling and domain expertise

definition: Observed pattern such as rising variance autocorrelation repeated near misses or slower recovery
measurement_note: Requires careful interpretation and data quality review

definition: Degree to which unequal exposure access backup capacity and recovery burden are visible
measurement_note: Requires disaggregated data and participatory interpretation

definition: Clarity about missing data uncertainty method limitations and update frequency
